name: Darkwood Trail
description: A narrow dirt path winds north into a dense, shadow-choked forest. The trees crowd closer with every step, and the keep's watchmen will tell you only seasoned adventurers follow this trail past the treeline. Back to the south lies the safety of the courtyard.
ambient_messages: A distant howl rises through the trees and fades into silence.
Branches creak and rustle overhead in a wind you cannot feel.
Something unseen crashes through the undergrowth off the trail, then goes still.
